_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in debugging data applications across multiple system layers, tracing issues through application code, database queries, network connectivity, and infrastructure configuration to identify root causes.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI TF domain. Skill TF-S-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.530), AI-S-017 (AI, cosine: 0.469).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.524). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. NICE-only terms [client, level, problems, troubleshooting] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, application, applications, causes, code, configuration] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.885 (P=0.914, R=0.857). P exceeds R by 0.057 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Skill in troubleshooting client-level problems" and "Skill in debugging data applications across multiple system layers, tracing issu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.554 ≈ STS 0.524 (gap 0.030). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.9%. Shared tokens: [skill]. NICE-only: [client, level, problems, troubleshooting]. WIDAI-only: [across, application, applications, causes, code, configuration].
